name: Sony CFexpress Type A TOUGH Memory Card
description: Offering both strength and speed, the CFexpress Type A TOUGH Memory Card from Sony provides fast read speeds up to 800 MB/s along with write speeds up to 700 MB/s.

features.Key Features:: 80/160/320/640GB Storage Capacity | PCIe 3.0 Bus | Max Read Speed: 800 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 700 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 400 MB/s | Shock / UV Light / X-Ray Proof | Rigidity Tested to 70 N | File Rescue Recover & Media Scan Utility
